title: Adjust view of workload widget
excerpt: I would like to be able to customize the view of the workload widget. Even in the daily view, the columns are sometimes too narrow, so that you can’t read all of a person’s tasks easily or have to click on the tasks indi…

posts.author: Coralie (Lührs)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to customize the view of the workload widget. Even in the daily view, the columns are sometimes too narrow, so that you can’t read all of a person’s tasks easily or have to click on the tasks individually. An alternative would be that when you click on the respective person, an overview of the pending tasks opens, in which the tasks are then completely readable.

posts.author: Ash13 (Ash McCallum)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m keen to see some updates here too. Given that we can scroll across from date to date, why do the columns need to be so narrow? Would love to be able to increase the size of the columns to give us more UX/UI real estate.

posts.author: Teresa.DevSamurai (Teresa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ash McCallum:

do the columns need to be so narrow? Would love to be able to increase the size of the columns to give us more UX/UI real estate.

Hi @Coralie

For workload management, I think you could give this app on monday.com a try: TeamBoard - Resource Planning & Time Tracking - monday.com App Marketplace
